author.bio: #IPFS Core Dev, creator David DM http://david-dm.org, co-creator & organiser @NodeBotsUK & @MeteorLondon meetups. Owner TABLEFLIP https://tableflip.io
author.name: Alan Shaw

content.text: I've been working on the newest version of the IPFS Companion browser extension. IT IS SO ACE. Check it out if you're interested in #IPFS or the distributed web. Install #chrome: https://chrome.google.com/webstore/detail/ipfs-companion/nibjojkomfdiaoajekhjakgkdhaomnch or #firefox: https://addons.mozilla.org/en-US/firefox/addon/ipfs-companion/ release notes: https://github.com/ipfs-shipyard/ipfs-companion/releases/tag/v2.2.0
